column1: Target: ≤ $400 USD  |  Weight: < 250 g  |  Owns: Frame, Prop Guards, Soldering Iron & Solder

column8: Notes
The physical circuit board that all components are soldered onto.
The brain of the drone — runs Betaflight flight control software.
Overlays flight data (battery, speed, signal) onto the video feed.
Controls motor speed in response to flight controller commands.
Smooths and filters power across the board to protect components.
Measures rotation and movement so the drone can stabilise itself.
Plug sockets for connecting the receiver, camera, VTX and LEDs.
Spin the propellers to generate thrust and lift.
Generate airflow/thrust. Replaced after crashes — buy spares.
Captures the live video feed that is sent to the goggles.
Transmits the live video wirelessly from the drone to the goggles.
The handheld controller you use to fly the drone.
Receives signals from the radio controller and sends them to the FC.
Power source for the radio transmitter.

column2: EV800D 5.8 GHz Analog Goggles w/ DVR
column8: Headset that displays the live video from the drone camera.
Stores energy and powers the entire drone during flight.
Safely recharges the LiPo flight batteries.
Carries electrical current between components.
Connects the battery to the drone power circuit.
Bolt the flight controller, motors and frame together.
Space and isolate the FC above the ESC in the stack.
Lock screws in place so they do not vibrate loose mid-flight.
Absorb vibration between the FC and frame for a clean gyro signal.
